---
title: 'Session 9: 23 Jan'
author: "Dhruvi Sheth 22294"
output:
  pdf_document: default
  html_notebook: default
---

```{r}
getwd()
```

```{r}
infect <- read.table("../Project_files/data/infect.txt", header = FALSE, sep = "\t")
```

```{r}
# Assign column names
colnames(infect) <- c("SampleID", "Ratio", "CellLine")
```

```{r}
infect
```

```{r}
# Bar Plot

par(mar = c(5, 5, 4, 2))  
# bottom, left, top, right

par(pin = c(2, 2.8)) 

# assign colors
colors <- ifelse(infect$Ratio >= 30, "blue",
          ifelse(infect$Ratio >= 9, "green", 
          ifelse(infect$Ratio <= 2, "red", "grey")))

barplot(infect$Ratio,
        names.arg = infect$ CellLine,
        col = colors,
        horiz = TRUE,
        las = 2,
        xaxt = "n",
        xlim = c(0, 40),
        xlab = "Nef+/Nef- infectivity ratio",
        main = "Infectivity Ratio Across Cell Lines")

axis(1, at = seq(0, 40, by = 10))
```
